steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: The subject is “lost works” (plural), with an inserted parenthetical—”no copy of which exists”—referring to the singular Histories. The head noun of the subject remains plural.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content: Subject-verb agreement requires a verb to match its subject in number. Choice A “have become” is the only plural verb form available. Choices B, C, and D are all singular forms, which violate this agreement. That matches choice A — A is correct.
